### Props

| Name                 | Type      | Required | Default   | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| -------------------- | --------- | -------- | --------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ------ | --- | ------ | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `propertyKey`        | `string`  | ✓        | —         | The schema property key                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `schema`             | `object`  |          | `null`    | Full JSON schema object                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `value`              | `boolean  | string   | number    | object                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | array` |     | `null` | Resolved current value (formData[key] ?? objectValue) |
| `isEditable`         | `boolean` |          | `true`    | Whether this property is editable at all                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `isEditing`          | `boolean` |          | `false`   | Whether this row is currently selected for editing                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `displayName`        | `string`  |          | `''`      | Display name for the property (used in labels/placeholders)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `editabilityWarning` | `string`  |          | `null`    | Editability warning message shown as title when not editable                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `widget`             | `string`  |          | `null`    | Override the auto-detected widget for this cell. When null (default), the widget is derived from the schema (boolean/datetime/text/number), with auto-detection for `format: 'text'` (textarea) and `type: 'array'`. Accepted: 'text', 'number', 'boolean', 'datetime', 'textarea', 'array', 'select'. |
| `selectOptions`      | `array`   |          | `null`    | Options for the `select` widget. Each option may be a string, or `{ id, label }`.                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `selectMultiple`     | `boolean` |          | `true`    | Whether the `select` widget allows multiple values.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `textareaRows`       | `number`  |          | `4`       | Number of rows for the `textarea` widget.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `objectEditorHeight` | `string`  |          | `'300px'` | CSS height for the `object` widget's CodeMirror editor.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
